arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs defender 'wants to leave' if Real Madrid come calling this summer
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven would like to leave Tottenham Hotspur this summer if Real Madrid make an offer for his services, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Van de Ven wary of ‘unbelievable’ Frankfurt threat
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur centre-back Micky van de Ven has called Eintracht Frankfurt forward Hugo Ekitike an ‘unbelievable threat’ but said he hopes to ‘eliminate’ him from tonight’s Europa League clash. Spurs travel to Germany for the second leg of their quarter-final tie tonight, with the score tied at 1-1 on aggregate. arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur XI vs Eintracht Frankfurt – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Germany to take on Eintracht Frankfurt this evening. The Europa League quarter-final clash is perfectly poised, following a 1-1 draw in North London last week. Spurs dominated that first contest, but were unable to find a winner as the home side spurned several clear-cut chances. For Ange Postecoglou, it appears win-or-bust […] The post Tottenham Hotspur XI vs Eintracht Frankfurt – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Bayern are hoping will happen with potential Tottenham transfer deal
arts.sum: Tottenham signed Mathys Tel on loan from Bayern Munich in January, and Christian Falk has provided CaughtOffside with an exclusive update on the French striker’s situation. Writing for his latest Daily Briefing column, Falk said that Bayern are now looking to offload Tel, though it remains to be seen if Spurs will pay up for […] The post Exclusive: What Bayern are hoping will happen with potential Tottenham transfer deal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer major injury blow as Ange Postecoglou faces ultimatum
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou confirms a huge injury blow for Tottenham ahead of a career-defining Europa League clash with Frankfurt.
